definition: Reference proteins whose UniProt accession is NOT in the gold development/tuning set (69 accessions that set the death-motif gate thresholds). These proteins never influenced any threshold.

MR_separation.note: AUC<0.5 is expected: MR is a pocket-retention score, higher in active enzymes. MR is NOT a deadness detector; the dead-call gate is.

method_note: Reference set literature-curated (Murphy/Eyers/Ribeiro/Todd/Tonks/Manning + metabolic/cofactor expansion: CARPs, ALDH dead enzymes, pseudo-NDPKs, pseudo-amidases). Independent of tool scores. dead_call=override_pos (death-motif gate). Wilson 95% CIs. ONLY out-of-sample metrics reported.
